row.address: Avinguda de la Cova 67 / Avda. Mas de l'Oli 67, 46940 Manises, Valencia
row.description: 平台代登记商家信息，商家待认领。Public sources identify Angelpet / OU JIA MASCOTAS S.L.U. as a pet supplies wholesale and retail business in Manises, Valencia. Weinfo lists it as 欧佳贸易, venta al por mayor / valencia 宠物用品批发, with phone, mobile and email. TodosBiz, Perrolia and InfoNIF also list the business at Avinguda de la Cova or Avda. Mas de l Oli 67, Manises. Google Maps link supplied by site owner was used only to confirm the location.
